product_overview: teacher-app is a mobile and web application for LearnAdolphin teachers to manage authentication, schedules, live tutoring sessions, student groups, private tutoring, reviews, content, and profile settings. It provides a teacher-focused workspace for running classes and handling day-to-day teaching tasks from a single app.
core_goals: Authenticate with a phone number and access the teacher workspace
Review and manage teaching schedules and lessons
Create and manage subject groups and student reviews
Run live virtual classroom sessions with chat, whiteboard, tools, and games
Manage session learning content and recordings
Coordinate private tutoring availability, bookings, and session history
View feedback and manage teacher profile settings

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Teachers can sign in with a phone number using either a password or OTP, register a new account, set a first password, and reset forgotten credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to the login screen -> Enter phone number -> Continue to account check -> See password login or OTP login path based on account setup -> Complete sign in -> Enter the main workspace
Navigate to the login screen -> Enter phone number -> Continue to account check -> Choose password sign in -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> See the main workspace
Navigate to the login screen -> Enter phone number -> Continue to account check -> Choose OTP sign in -> Request OTP -> Enter OTP -> Submit verification -> See the main workspace
Navigate to the registration screen -> Enter required account details -> Submit registration form -> Set an initial password -> See the main workspace
Navigate to the forgot password screen -> Enter phone number -> Request reset OTP -> Verify OTP -> Enter new password and confirmation -> Submit reset form -> See the login screen

features.name: Schedule / Home
features.description: Teachers can view lesson schedules in daily or weekly formats and open lessons for editing.
user_flows: Navigate to the schedule screen -> View the weekly lesson list -> Switch to the daily view -> Review lesson timeline entries -> Open a lesson for editing -> Update lesson details -> Return to the schedule
Navigate to the schedule screen -> Choose a date -> View that day's lessons -> Review lesson cards and timing -> Open a lesson for editing -> Save changes -> Return to the schedule

features.name: Groups
features.description: Teachers can browse subject groups, create new groups, inspect enrolled students, delete groups, and review students within a group.
user_flows: Navigate to the groups screen -> View the list of subject groups -> Create a new group -> Review the updated group list
Navigate to the groups screen -> Open a group -> View the group's students -> Return to the group list
Navigate to the groups screen -> Open a group -> Review students for that subject group -> Submit student review information
Navigate to the groups screen -> Open a group -> Delete the group -> See the group removed from the list

features.name: Meeting Lobby & Room
features.description: Teachers can prepare for a session in the lobby and then run a live classroom with students, chat, whiteboard, teaching tools, and in-class games or quizzes.
user_flows: Navigate to the meeting lobby -> Review session information -> Enter the meeting room -> See the live classroom workspace
Navigate to the meeting room -> View the student list -> Open chat -> Send a message -> Continue teaching in the room
Navigate to the meeting room -> Open the whiteboard -> Draw or annotate content -> Return to the classroom workspace
Navigate to the meeting room -> Open teaching tools -> Use a classroom tool -> Return to the room workspace
Navigate to the meeting room -> Open games and quizzes -> Build a question -> Adjust game settings -> Start the activity -> Continue the live session
Navigate to the meeting room -> End the session -> Confirm ending the class -> See the end session modal

features.name: Session Content
features.description: Teachers can view learning content attached to a session, upload new content, manage existing content, and open session recordings.
user_flows: Navigate to the session content screen -> Select a session -> View attached learning content -> Return to the session list
Navigate to the add content screen -> Pick a file from the device -> Upload the content -> See the new content attached to the session
Navigate to the session content screen -> Open an existing content item -> Update the content details -> Save the changes -> See the updated content
Navigate to the session content screen -> Open an existing content item -> Delete the content -> See the item removed
Navigate to the session recordings view -> Open the recordings list -> Select a recording -> View the recording details

features.name: Private Tutoring
features.description: Teachers can monitor private tutoring activity, manage availability, review session history, and adjust private tutoring settings.
user_flows: Navigate to the private tutoring screen -> Review dashboard statistics -> Inspect booking requests -> Open an upcoming session -> Return to the dashboard
Navigate to the private tutoring screen -> Open availability scheduling -> Select a day -> Choose available time slots -> Review the schedule legend -> Save the availability
Navigate to the private tutoring screen -> Open the session log -> Review past sessions -> Check status badges and ratings -> Return to the private tutoring overview
Navigate to the private tutoring screen -> Open private tutoring settings -> Edit the available settings -> Save changes -> Return to the private tutoring overview

features.name: Reviews
features.description: Teachers can view student feedback and the reviews they have written, including grade-based filtering and star ratings.
user_flows: Navigate to the reviews screen -> View received student feedback -> Inspect star ratings -> Return to the review list
Navigate to the reviews screen -> View teacher-written student reviews -> Filter by grade -> Review the filtered results -> Clear or change the grade filter

features.name: Hall
features.description: Teachers can manage linked halls by creating, updating, deleting, and toggling them, and can open a connect-login flow in an external browser.
user_flows: Navigate to the hall screen -> View the list of halls -> Create a new hall -> See the hall added to the list
Navigate to the hall screen -> Open an existing hall -> Update hall details -> Save changes -> See the updated hall
Navigate to the hall screen -> Open an existing hall -> Toggle its active state -> See the status change
Navigate to the hall screen -> Open an existing hall -> Delete the hall -> See it removed from the list
Navigate to the hall screen -> Start connect-login -> Open the external browser flow -> Complete the connection process

features.name: Library
features.description: Teachers can access the library through login-link and view library information in an external browser flow.
user_flows: Navigate to the library screen -> Open the login-link flow -> Launch the external browser -> Access the library
Navigate to the library screen -> View library information -> Open the external information flow -> Return to the app

features.name: Guides
features.description: Teachers can browse the in-app help and guides listing.
user_flows: Navigate to the guides screen -> View the list of guides -> Open a guide entry -> Read the help content -> Return to the guide list

features.name: Community
features.description: Teachers can open the community area and access group chat.
user_flows: Navigate to the community tab -> Open group chat -> View the conversation -> Send a message -> Continue chatting

features.name: Profile
features.description: Teachers can view and edit their profile, upload a profile image, and change their password.
user_flows: Navigate to the profile screen -> View profile details -> Open edit mode -> Update profile information -> Save changes -> See the updated profile
Navigate to the profile screen -> Open image upload -> Select a profile image -> Upload the image -> See the new profile picture
Navigate to the profile screen -> Open password change -> Enter current password -> Enter new password and confirmation -> Submit the change -> Return to the profile screen

code_summary.description: A teacher-facing mobile application for an online tutoring/learning platform (LearnAdolphin). Teachers authenticate by phone number (OTP or password), manage their teaching schedule and sessions, run live meeting rooms with students (chat, whiteboard, in-class games/quizzes, tools), administer student groups and halls, upload session content/recordings, manage private tutoring availability and bookings, view and give student reviews, and maintain their profile.

tech_stack.framework: Expo SDK 56 with Expo Router 56 (file-based routing, typed routes)
platforms: Web (react-native-web, static output) — used for browser-based testing

backend_api.auth: Bearer token (injected via axios request interceptor); 401 clears session
backend_api.notes: The app is purely a client; it consumes a remote REST API. All endpoints are namespaced under /teachers.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Phone-based login. Flow checks whether the phone has a password set, then routes to password login or OTP verification. Supports registration, first-time password setup, forgot/reset password via OTP, profile fetch, and logout. Auth is hydrated from secure storage on startup; an AuthGuard redirects unauthenticated users to (auth)/login and authenticated users into (tabs).

features.name: Schedule / Home
features.description: Teacher's lesson schedule with daily and weekly views, timeline entries, and lesson editing.

features.name: Groups
features.description: Manage subject groups: list, create, view students, delete, and review students per group.

features.name: Meeting Lobby & Room
components: components/MeetingRoom/* (ChatPanel, StudentsPanel, ToolsPanel, OthersPanel, WhiteboardView, GamesPanel, EndModal, RoomIcons)
features.description: Pre-session lobby and live virtual classroom: student list, chat, whiteboard, teaching tools, and interactive in-class games/quizzes with a question builder and game settings.

features.name: Session Content
features.description: View and manage learning content attached to a session; upload content (document picker) and view recordings.

features.name: Private Tutoring
features.description: Private 1:1 tutoring management: dashboard with stats and booking requests, availability scheduling, session log/history, and settings.

features.name: Reviews
features.description: View feedback received from students and reviews the teacher gave to students, filterable by grade.

features.name: Hall (external links)
features.description: Manage teacher link "halls": list, create, update, delete, toggle, and connect-login (opens external web browser).

features.name: Library
features.description: Teacher library access via login-link and info (external).

features.name: Guides
features.description: Teacher help/guides listing.

features.name: Community
features.description: Community tab and group chat.

features.name: Profile
features.description: View and edit teacher profile, upload profile image, change password.

cross_cutting.name: Global Alerts
cross_cutting.description: Centralized alert system. The axios response interceptor surfaces API errors as global alerts via an alertGateway; GlobalAlert component renders them app-wide.

entry_points.app_root: app/_layout.tsx (Redux Provider, theme, fonts, splash, AuthGuard)
